name_en: M81866 Screen Print! Monogram Mahjong Bag Series MINI POCHETTE ACCESSORIES. Small handbag. This mini wallet is made of canvas and can hold cosmetics or personal items. It features a gold brass chain for easy attachment to a handbag. Size: 14 x 9 x 2 cm
